summary: Iteration 29 - Enterprise Topology Features Testing. All backend (15/15) and frontend tests passed. New features verified: search bar, type/status filters, device detail panel with 6 sections, real-time refresh with timestamp, Aggiorna/PNG buttons, Reset filters button.

backend_device_detail_endpoint: Returns alerts array (even if empty) with alerts_count and active_alerts
Returns port_speeds with 10G ports (port 9 and 10 on Netgear .3)
backend_alerts_summary_endpoint: Returns alerts map (device_ip -> counts with total/critical/high/medium/low)
frontend_search_bar: Search bar visible with placeholder 'Cerca dispositivo, IP, MAC...'
Search for 'netgear' works and shows Reset button
Reset button clears search and disappears
frontend_type_filters: All type filters present: Tutti, Switch, Firewall, Server, Endpoint, AP WiFi
Clicking Switch filter shows Reset button
frontend_status_filters: All status filters present: Tutti, Online, Offline, Con Alert
frontend_toolbar_buttons: Modifica, Auto, Reset, Salva Layout buttons present
frontend_device_detail_panel: Click on node opens detail panel on right side
Panel shows device name and IP
INFORMAZIONI DISPOSITIVO section: Stato, Nome, Tipo Monitor, Latenza, System Description
ALERT section shows count (0) and 'Nessun alert' when empty
PORTE HIGH-SPEED section shows Port 9 10G, Port 10 10G for Netgear .3
ENDPOINT CONNESSI section shows AP-WIFI-ARMADIO (192.168.1.70, Port 5)
CONNESSIONI MAC section shows Port 9 -> 192.168.1.4, Port 10 -> 192.168.1.5
Close button (X) works to close panel

critical_code_review_comments: NetworkMap.js correctly implements OverlayContext to avoid infinite loops with search/filter/impact state
DeviceDetailPanel.js correctly fetches and displays all 6 sections from device-detail API
topology.py device-detail endpoint returns comprehensive data: device, alerts, connected_endpoints, lldp_neighbors, port_speeds, mac_connections
topology.py alerts-summary endpoint correctly aggregates alerts by device IP with severity breakdown
Real-time refresh every 30 seconds implemented with lastRefresh timestamp display
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data with 8 managed devices + 11 discovered_endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise topology features fully validated. Backend: device-detail returns 6 data sections (device, alerts, connected_endpoints, lldp_neighbors, port_speeds, mac_connections). alerts-summary returns alert counts per device IP. topology includes discovered_endpoints_count. Frontend: Search bar with 'Cerca dispositivo, IP, MAC...' placeholder, type filters (Tutti/Switch/Firewall/Server/Endpoint/AP WiFi), status filters (Tutti/Online/Offline/Con Alert), Reset button appears when filter active, device detail panel slides in from right with all sections, health bar shows timestamp/endpoint count/LLDP/MAC badges/score.

search_bar.functionality: Filters nodes by name/IP/MAC, shows Reset button when active

sections: INFORMAZIONI DISPOSITIVO (Stato, Nome, Tipo Monitor, Latenza, System Description)
